docket_entries.description: DECLARATION MAISHA DAVIS FILED RE: LOST NOTE IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK'S MOTION TO VACATE THE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT FOR SIGNATURE. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
